title: Chapter 776
content:
Nick felt his Zephyx increasing as he walked out of the Containment Unit.

Two more years had passed since the Sun had looked at him, and Nick had finally become a Peak Demon.

Peak Demon.

Nick was finally on the level of the most powerful Agents.

He had always fought people above his level, but now, his actual level was the same as the strong Agents.

Nick still remembered how powerful the Governor and Aria had been back then.

But now, he completely dwarfed them.

Aria was most likely still alive and still somewhere out there, but she definitely hadn't become a Protector yet.

While she had the talent to become a Protector, not enough time had passed for her to become one.

This meant that Nick had caught up with her.

And if one included his actual power, he had surpassed her by quite a bit.

Nick was no longer weak.

He could fight Fallen and Protectors now.

While he couldn't fight any of the Corruptors, he also wasn't completely helpless in front of them.

If a Corruptor found him, there was a chance that Nick might be able to run away.

'I'm a Peak Demon now, which means the time to attack the Envious Researcher has arrived,' he thought.

'I still don't know if this will actually work. Everything depends on the Champion.'

'If he actually tries, we might succeed. If he doesn't, there's no hope.'

"I've advanced," Nick told the Left Arm with his Barrier.

"Good. I'm going to tell the Protectors that they don't need to come anymore," the Left Arm answered. "Come to my office. We need to talk about the mission." ȑå𐌽
